mapper.insert: insert into auth_refresh_token(token_hash, user_id, family_id, expires_at, revoked_at) select #{tokenHash}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{familyId}, #{expiresAt}, null where not exists ( select 1 from auth_refresh_token_family_revocation where family_id = #{familyId} ) on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), family_id = values(family_id), expires_at = values(expires_at), revoked_at = null
mapper.update: update auth_refresh_token set revoked_at = now() where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and revoked_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into auth_refresh_token_family_revocation(family_id, revoked_at) values (#{familyId}, now()) on duplicate key update revoked_at = values(revoked_at)
mapper.update: update auth_refresh_token set revoked_at = now() where family_id = #{familyId} and revoked_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into auth_refresh_token_family_revocation(family_id, revoked_at) select distinct family_id, now() from auth_refresh_token where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} on duplicate key update revoked_at = values(revoked_at)
mapper.update: update auth_refresh_token set revoked_at = now() where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and revoked_at is null
